title: My Favourite Toy
summary: A young girl describes her favourite toy rabbit and why she loves it so much.
body: My favourite toy is a rabbit. His name is Fluffy. He is small and soft. He is white with brown spots on his ears. I got Fluffy as a gift on my birthday two years ago. He came in a big purple box. I was so happy when I opened it. Fluffy has two long ears and big black eyes. His nose is pink and round. I take Fluffy everywhere with me. He comes to school in my bag. He sits on my bed at night. When I am sad, I hug Fluffy and I feel better. He is very good at keeping secrets. I tell him all my stories. I also talk to him before I sleep. Fluffy is a little dirty now because I take him everywhere. His white fur has some grey spots. Mum wants to wash him in the washing machine. But I say no because I am afraid he will change. My sister has a toy bear. Her bear is bigger than Fluffy. But I think Fluffy is the best toy in the world. He is my best friend.

annotations.exampleEn: The toy is soft and nice to hold.
The puppy is white with brown spots.
She received a book as a gift for her birthday.
She takes her toy cat everywhere with her.
He is very good at keeping secrets.
The rabbit has very soft white fur.
She puts her clothes in the washing machine.
She is afraid the colours will fade in the wash.
She hugs her teddy bear when she feels sad.
My dog is my best friend.
After talking to my friend, I feel better.

grammarNotes.title: Adjectives to describe toys and objects
grammarNotes.bodyVi: Tính từ mô tả đặc điểm của đồ vật: 'He is small and soft.' / 'He is white with brown spots.' / 'His nose is pink and round.' Tính từ đứng trước danh từ ('soft toy') hoặc sau 'be' ('He is soft'). Thứ tự thường gặp: kích thước + màu sắc + chất liệu.
grammarNotes.bodyEn: Adjectives describe the features of objects: 'He is small and soft.' / 'He is white with brown spots.' / 'His nose is pink and round.' Adjectives come before nouns ('soft toy') or after 'be' ('He is soft'). Common order: size + colour + material.

grammarNotes.title: Comparatives with '-er' and 'than'
grammarNotes.bodyVi: Để so sánh hai người hoặc vật, thêm '-er' vào tính từ ngắn và dùng 'than': 'Her bear is bigger than Fluffy.' / 'He is better than my old toy.' Với tính từ kết thúc bằng '-y', đổi thành '-ier': dirty → dirtier.
grammarNotes.bodyEn: To compare two things, add '-er' to short adjectives and use 'than': 'Her bear is bigger than Fluffy.' / 'He is better than my old toy.' For adjectives ending in '-y', change to '-ier': dirty → dirtier.

translationVi: Đồ chơi yêu thích của tôi là một con thỏ. Tên của nó là Fluffy. Nó nhỏ và mềm mại. Nó màu trắng với những đốm nâu trên tai. Tôi nhận Fluffy như một món quà sinh nhật hai năm trước. Nó đến trong một hộp màu tím lớn. Tôi rất vui khi mở nó ra. Fluffy có hai tai dài và đôi mắt đen to. Mũi của nó màu hồng và tròn. Tôi mang Fluffy theo khắp nơi. Nó đến trường trong túi của tôi. Nó ngồi trên giường của tôi vào ban đêm. Khi tôi buồn, tôi ôm Fluffy và tôi cảm thấy tốt hơn. Nó rất giỏi giữ bí mật. Tôi kể cho nó nghe tất cả các câu chuyện của tôi. Tôi cũng nói chuyện với nó trước khi ngủ. Fluffy bây giờ hơi bẩn vì tôi mang nó đi khắp nơi. Bộ lông trắng của nó có một số đốm xám. Mẹ muốn giặt nó trong máy giặt. Nhưng tôi nói không vì tôi sợ nó sẽ thay đổi. Em gái tôi có một con gấu bông. Con gấu của em gái lớn hơn Fluffy. Nhưng tôi nghĩ Fluffy là đồ chơi tuyệt vời nhất trên thế giới. Nó là người bạn thân nhất của tôi.

questions.prompt: What is the narrator's favourite toy?

questions.explanation: 'He is white with brown spots on his ears.'

questions.prompt: When did the narrator get Fluffy?
options: On her birthday two years ago
questions.explanation: 'I got Fluffy as a gift on my birthday two years ago.'
questions.hint: Find the sentence about receiving Fluffy.

questions.prompt: What colour was the box Fluffy came in?
questions.explanation: 'He came in a big purple box.'
questions.hint: Find the sentence about the box.

questions.explanation: 'Fluffy has two long ears and big black eyes.'
questions.hint: Find the description of Fluffy's eyes.

questions.prompt: Where does Fluffy sit at night?
questions.explanation: 'He sits on my bed at night.'

questions.prompt: What does the narrator do with Fluffy when she is sad?
options: She puts him in her bag
questions.explanation: 'When I am sad, I hug Fluffy and I feel better.'
questions.hint: Find what she does when she feels sad.

questions.prompt: Why is Fluffy a little dirty now?
questions.explanation: 'Fluffy is a little dirty now because I take him everywhere.'
questions.hint: Find the reason Fluffy is dirty.

questions.prompt: What does Mum want to do with Fluffy?
options: Wash him in the washing machine
Sew new buttons on his eyes
questions.explanation: 'Mum wants to wash him in the washing machine.'
questions.hint: Find what Mum wants to do.

questions.prompt: What toy does the narrator's sister have?
questions.hint: Find the sentence about the sister's toy.

questions.prompt: How does the narrator describe Fluffy at the end?

'He is very good at keeping secrets.'

criticalThinkingQuestion: The narrator loves Fluffy even though he is dirty and old. Do you think it is important to keep old toys or favourite things? Why do you think some objects become special to us?
